action_items.action: GDCU-8619 Operator List Redesign is STILL Blocked (11+ days) — Ciara Carroll is on leave today. Determine what specific decision is preventing progress, whether Miguel or another designer can cover, and whether escalation to Gabriel or Colin is needed. Do not let this drift into week 3.

Review GDCU-8893 Gambling.com Design System (Highest priority, In Product) — Ciara published the design system to Claude Design on 2026-04-24 18:28 BST, announced in #gdc-product-led-growth: 30+ components, 12+ elements, Orion git integration, colour grades, type families, 300+ icons, 200+ images, design.md and skill.md files. Now live at claude.ai/design. Mike is a stakeholder — test it, prepare feedback for Ciara's return tomorrow.

Respond to Colin Brannigan re: product engineer candidate interview — Colin asked 2026-04-24 14:01 BST if Mike would interview the candidate (role will sit in the dev team). Also follow up on the Ace wireframe concept Colin shared via Claude Design on 2026-04-24 17:17 BST — Mike said he sees Ace as the primary decision product with many site variables needed for testing.

Review and approve fix for GDCU-8869 Desktop PSI geo-redirect race condition (High, Sanja Budic, In Product, NEW since last report) — 78+ URLs across all markets are failing desktop PSI audits due to inline redirect firing before isGooglePageSpeedInsightsAgent() is defined. Fix documented: Option 1 (recommended) change DOMContentLoaded to load event. Mobile PSI unaffected. CWV monitoring broken. Needs Mike's sign-off to progress.

Review GDCU-8512 Always On Betting Tips Page (Miguel Migneco, In Product, updated 2026-04-26) — only sprint ticket with activity over the weekend. Mobile-first Betting Tips Hub with Ace tip card components, sport navigation, Matrix widget integration, and operator offers module. Stakeholders: Colin Brannigan, Dean Ryan, Dan Smullen, Chloe Christie. Mike's review is the blocker to progression.

Follow up with Jessica Dordevic on Tinder Widget usability test (GDCU-8546) — Jessica ran a usability test and flagged items in Figma on 2026-04-24 10:21 BST. Mike reviewed and left comments on 2026-04-24 14:22 BST. Check whether Jessica has actioned the feedback and if the design is on track for sign-off this sprint. Figma: https://www.figma.com/design/TC2FN9AV2khKjwAE87mGx6/GDCU-8546----Tinder-Style-Offer-Match?node-id=90-262464

Reschedule oplist redesign approach discussion with Ciara — Mike proposed talking Monday (today) about the oplist redesign direction following the Bet365 T&C solution going live on QA10 (qa10.gambling.com/uk/online-casinos). Ciara is on leave today. Rebook for tomorrow (Tuesday 28 April) or Wednesday.

Review and sign off GDCU-8801 Oplist Redesign on CA/FR Casino Page (Ciara Carroll, In Product) — 11 days without update (since 2026-04-16). Ciara on leave today. Determine if this can be reviewed and progressed independently, or whether it's gated on Ciara's return. Stakeholders: Gabriel Cornoiu, Diana Thurmann, Kelvin Yee.

Review and sign off GDCU-8862 Offer Terms Static/Scrollable (Kelvin Yee, In Product, updated 2026-04-24) — directly linked to the Bet365 compliance requirement. Enables hybrid T&C model: Bet365 gets static terms on all UK oplists; all other operators get scrollable terms. Mike and Chloe Christie are named stakeholders.

Review and sign off GDCU-8824 Cosmo Spins/Slot Tournament Event Tags (Kelvin Yee, In Product, updated 2026-04-24) — Bloomreach push notification integration. CRM team (Shaun Cronin, Simon Merner) is waiting on the event ID to build the automation workflow. Trigger fires once per completed session. Mike and Chloe are named stakeholders.

Review and sign off GDCU-8807 Dynamic Content API — Cloudflare Workers + D1 + GDC Admin Panel (Kelvin Yee, In Product, updated 2026-04-24) — mobile app backend enabling content updates (banners, offers, Cosmo Spins featured game) without app releases. Four API endpoints, admin panel UI, and empty-state handling required per acceptance criteria.

Review and sign off GDCU-8694 Image Carousel 500x290 (Jessica Dordevic, In Product, updated 2026-04-24) — adds 500x290 option to the image carousel shortcode. Jessica is back and active. Mike is a named stakeholder — review Figma submission and provide sign-off.

Confirm Vic Dadson sick leave status — Vic was signed off for 2 weeks from 2026-04-21 with new medication. Expected return ~2026-05-05. Mike referred her to the BI team (Nemanja) for data support on return. Check-in via DM if appropriate, ensure HR/Bob leave is logged.

Finalise and document stakeholder intake checklist — Mike, Chloe, and Gabriel collaborated on a pre-project question template across multiple DMs. Gabriel added SEO/IA considerations and operator offer attributes on 2026-04-23. Chloe added existing component reuse, data source, and pagination questions on 2026-04-22. Create a canonical Confluence page or Jira ticket template.

needs_input.context: Highest priority ticket in sprint. Ciara published the design system to Claude Design on 2026-04-24 18:28 BST (#gdc-product-led-growth announcement). Live at claude.ai/design with 30+ components, 300+ icons, 200+ images, Orion git integration. Mike is a named stakeholder alongside Colin Brannigan, Chloe Christie, and Gabriel Cornoiu. Review and sign off. Ciara on leave today — prepare feedback for her return.

Blocked 11+ days since 2026-04-16. Ciara on leave today. 3 grid-format iterations of the UK casino oplist (mobile-first). Vic Dadson (also off sick) is a stakeholder. Mike needs to identify the blocking decision, whether another designer can cover, and escalation path if needed.

Most recently active sprint ticket — updated 2026-04-26. Mobile-first Betting Tips Hub: hub landing page, sport section template, Ace tip card component, operator offers module, sport navigation. Stakeholders: Colin Brannigan, Dean Ryan, Dan Smullen, Chloe Christie. Awaiting Mike's review.

needs_input.summary: [GDC][DEV][ALL GEOS] Desktop PSI blocked by geo-redirect race condition — inline redirect fires before isGooglePageSpeedInsightsAgent() is defined
needs_input.context: NEW since last report (updated 2026-04-24). 78+ URLs across US, UK, SE, RO, NZ, NO, IE, NL markets failing desktop PSI audits. Desktop CWV lab data and Screaming Frog PSI batch runs broken. Recommended fix: change DOMContentLoaded to load event. Stakeholders: Chloe Christie, Joshua Smith, Gabriel Cornoiu, Dan Smullen. High urgency — weekly CWV monitoring is unreliable until resolved.

needs_input.summary: [GDC][DEV][ALL GEOS] Add Logic for Offer Terms for a Brand to be Static or Scrollable
needs_input.context: Bet365 compliance issue resolved on QA10 (confirmed by Mike in Ciara DM 2026-04-24). This ticket formalises the hybrid T&C architecture: static for Bet365 on all UK oplists, scrollable for all other operators. Mike and Chloe are named stakeholders — review and sign off to enable release.

needs_input.summary: [GDC][DEV] Apply an Event Tag for Cosmo Spins/Slot Tournament Games
needs_input.context: Bloomreach integration — fires event when user exhausts Cosmo Spins or Slots Tournament credits (once per day, once per completed session). CRM team waiting on event ID for push notification workflow. Mike, Chloe Christie, Victoria Dadson are stakeholders. Vic is off sick — confirm if her involvement is needed for Bloomreach side.

needs_input.summary: [GDC][DEV] Set Up Dynamic Content API (Cloudflare Workers + D1 + GDC Admin Panel)
needs_input.context: Mobile app backend: Flutter App → Cloudflare Worker → D1 Database. Enables dynamic banners, casino offers, app config, and Cosmo Spins featured game without app releases. Admin panel allows non-technical content management. Release plan at gdcgroup.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/GDC/pages/6579716556. Mike's sign-off required.

needs_input.summary: [GDC][UX] - Oplist Redesign on CA/FR Casino Page
needs_input.context: In Product since 2026-04-16, no update in 11 days. Ciara on leave today. CA/FR casino oplist improvements from AI Day prototype: card refinements, search, filter, compare. Mike and Gabriel Cornoiu are named stakeholders. Assess independently or await Ciara's return.

Jessica is back and active (last active 2026-04-24). Adds 500x290 image size option to the image carousel for editorial use. Mike is a named stakeholder. Check Jessica's Figma output and provide sign-off.
